--- 
image: Liz.png 
description: Skills Development Lead 
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 10em 
  image-shape: round 
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn 
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/liz-stokes-b724b82b/ 
    - icon: orcid 
      text: ORCID 
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2973-5647  
    - icon: person-vcard 
      text: Staff page 
      href: https://profiles.uts.edu.au/Elizabeth.Stokes 
title: Liz Stokes 
--- 

Liz Stokes (Australian Research Data Commons) is Skills Development Lead Trainer at the Australian Research Data Commons (ARDC), where they translate practical training and community engagement programs into workforce development strategies for collaborative projects. This work in capability enablement across research software and data ecosystems, emphasises embedding user needs into sustainable community-oriented practices.
